title: Account Manager
description:
About Us

We are a leading automation and intelligent solutions provider, specializing in innovative systems for

asset/inventory management, tracking, and automation. Our solutions help enterprises

improve operational e iciency, reduce manual work, and achieve digital transformation. We are

expanding and looking for driven individuals to join our commercial team.


Role Overview

As part of our Commercial Team, you will play a key role in driving business growth by identifying

new opportunities, managing client relationships, and delivering tailored solutions. You will collaborate closely with technical teams to translate customer needs into solutions and support the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing.


What You’ll Do

  • Identify and develop new business opportunities for RFID software and hardware solutions.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, partners, and industry stakeholders.
  • Conduct product presentations, demonstrations, and solution proposals.
  • Understand client requirements and work with technical teams to design suitable solutions.
  • Manage the end-to-end sales cycle, including prospecting, quotation, negotiation, and closing deals.
  • Achieve sales targets and contribute to the overall growth strategy of the company.
  • Provide feedback to product and technical teams on market trends and customer needs.
  • Participate in exhibitions, events, and networking activities to promote solutions.

What We’re Looking For

  • Diploma/Degree in Business, IT, Engineering, or similar.
  • 1–3 years’ sales experience in IT/software/tech (fresh grads with strong interest are welcome).
  • Strong communicator, confident presenter, and skilled negotiator.
  • Results-driven, self-motivated, and a real team player.
  • Keen interest in RFID, IoT, and automation (training provided).

What You’ll Get

  • Base salary SGD 2,400–3,500/month + attractive commissions.
  • High earning potential with clear career progression.
  • Training, mentorship, and exposure to cutting-edge tech.

postedCompany.description:
At Intrasys, we deliver cutting-edge, custom RFID and IoT solutions that empower businesses with advanced automation and real-time tracking—driving operational excellence across Singapore, the Asia-Pacific, and beyond.
Our customized solutions provide maximum visibility, enabling precise asset tracking, seamless process automation, and data-driven insights.

Our Mission
We build the most integrated and comprehensive tools to achieve maximum visibility with intelligence.

Our Vision
The best companies journey with Intrasys to attain operational excellence, drive automation and discover actionable insights.

From supply chain & logistics to healthcare, government, retail and smart infrastructure, Intrasys empowers organizations with custom RFID and IoT-driven automation that enhances efficiency and control.
postedCompany.name: INTRASYS (PTE.) LTD.
